package.name: m5_tactical_planner
package.description: M5 Tactical Planner — L3 Tactical Layer Doer (PATH-D MISRA C++:2023). Implements dual-layer MPC (Mid-MPC 60-120s horizon + BC-MPC 10-30s reactive) for COLREGs-compliant avoidance trajectory generation. Backseat Driver pattern: zero vessel constants in decision-core code (all hydrodynamic parameters loaded from CapabilityManifest YAML). Reference: Yasukawa & Yoshimura 2015 [R7] — MMG 4-DOF model.
